summary: Iteration 65 - Service Pages Pack testing complete. All features working correctly: public routes (/services/:slug), dashboard routes (/dashboard/services/:slug), Services dropdown navigation with 6 categories, mobile menu, guest lead form, and button navigation flows.

tests: Service hero section displays with correct content
Page loads with correct service name
6 service categories displayed (Printing & Branding, Creative & Design, Facilities Services, Technical Support, Business Support, Uniforms & Workwear)
Service links navigate to correct /services/:slug routes
Service key passed as query parameter
Service key passed as query parameter
Form appears when guest clicks Start Service Request
All form fields present (fullname, email, phone, company, country, region, summary)

seed_data_creation: None - used fallback service data in components

mocked_apis.note: Components use FALLBACK_SERVICES data when API endpoints don't return data

context_for_next_testing_agent: Service Pages Pack fully functional. DynamicServiceDetailPage (/services/:slug) works for public users with guest lead form. AccountServiceDetailPage (/dashboard/services/:slug) works for logged-in users with direct navigation to service request and business pricing flows. PublicNavbarV2 has Services dropdown with 6 categories and 22 service links. Mobile menu also has expandable Services section. All navigation flows tested and working.
